summary: Tested Emergency and Advisory pages for guided paths API migration. Both pages successfully fetch dynamic content from /api/guided-paths/{pillar} instead of using hardcoded data. All 14 backend API tests passed. UI tests confirm correct rendering and interaction.
critical_code_review_comments: EmergencySituationGuides.jsx: Has FALLBACK_GUIDES for when API is unavailable
EmergencySituationGuides.jsx: transformApiPath() correctly maps API data to component format
AdvisoryPage.jsx: Icon mapping (ICON_MAP) handles API icon names to Lucide components
guided_paths_routes.py: API has SEED_GUIDED_PATHS with 8 emergency + 4 advisory paths
guided_paths_routes.py: Proper CRUD operations and seed endpoint available
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data verified: 8 emergency paths, 4 advisory paths in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guided paths migration complete. EmergencyPage shows 8 emergency guides from API with expand/collapse functionality showing Do NOW and Do NOT sections. AdvisoryPage shows 4 guided paths from API with steps containing clickable items that navigate to /shop?search={item}. Both have fallback data.

backend_api.response_structure: PASS - Contains pillar, paths[], total fields
backend_api.path_fields: PASS - All paths have id, title, description, icon, steps, is_active
backend_api.step_structure: PASS - Steps have title and items array

emergency_page_ui.expand_collapse: PASS - Clicking guide shows Do NOW and Do NOT sections
emergency_page_ui.data_source: PASS - Data from API, not hardcoded
